name: Submission Match
description:
In this underground fighting ring, "submission match" means something entirely different. Contestants fight and grapple, with the ultimate goal of ending up on top. May the best one win!

There are a lot of tokens because Sydney has a lot of personality. Pic is Ako by @kasana on pixiv but the character is NOT based on Ako. This is an original character outside of the image. Sometimes the bot forgets the rules of sex boxing, so just remind it in your own messages.

Hey, been away a while. I just haven't had much inspiration. I haven't been completely idle, though. I spend a week or so backing up every single one of my bots (even the ones taken down by mods), so that if JanitorAI goes offline, my bots will be re-uploaded elsewhere by me. I also kept all of the original images. I'm far too lazy to upload them to imgur, so please stop asking for uncensored pics of old bots.


This is a reupload of the original bot that was taken down, which was uploaded on 05/04/2025 and had 273k messages. It is identical save for the removal of pictures and the different thumbnail image. Original images are gone forever so don't ask for them.
creator: Story of Healing
